_comment: Reference copy of the Vercel routing config for the vendia-app project (domain vendia.store). The deployed file lives at build/web/vercel.json, which is gitignored — the .github/workflows/deploy-web.yml workflow regenerates it from this same content at deploy time. CRITICAL: the /admin rewrites MUST come before the SPA catch-all so vendia.store/admin keeps proxying to the Next.js admin (vendia-admin.vercel.app). Deploying without them breaks /admin.
